name: HOGE ExternalProduct 1024-point forward NTT oracle
description: Executable HOGE forward NTT correctness task using the original ExternalProduct final-output boundary. The test drives two TRLWE components, streams deterministic TRGSWNTT rows, and compares the final 32-bit torus output against current TFHEpp.

reference.final_boundary:
TFHEpp::TwistNTT

inside the TRGSWNTT ExternalProduct path

observable_contract.input_order: for component k, input cycle c, and lane l: io_in[l] carries input[k][l * 32 + c]
observable_contract.component_gap: the baseline protocol inserts 32 idle cycles between the two input components
observable_contract.trgsw_order: for TRGSW row r, stream cycle c, component k, and lane l: io_trgswin[2 * (k * 32 + l)] packs trgswntt[r][k][c * 32 + l].value
observable_contract.output_order: for component k, output cycle c, and lane l: io_out[l] must equal expected[k][l * 32 + c]
observable_contract.packing: 32-bit lanes use one Verilator word; 64-bit TRGSW/debug lanes use low word then high word

score.primary: minimize cycles from final input component to first valid output
